title: Hacked Humanoid Robots Wreak Havoc, Bureaucratic Gridlock Stalls Fixes and Derails Age Of Abundance
description:
Global Robotics Crisis: Hacked Humanoid Robots Wreak Havoc, Bureaucratic Gridlock Stalls Fixes and Derails Age Of Abundance 
By Elena Vasquez, Technology Correspondent
